mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(MAX(a.sys_id), #{sysId}) AS sysId , IFNULL(MAX(a.menu_cd), #{menuCd}) AS menuCd , IFNULL(MAX(a.role_cd), 'N') AS role_cd , IFNULL(MAX(a.sel_auth_yn), 'N') AS selAuthYn , IFNULL(MAX(a.add_auth_yn), 'N') AS addAuthYn , IFNULL(MAX(a.mdfy_auth_yn), 'N') AS mdfyAuthYn , IFNULL(MAX(a.del_auth_yn), 'N') AS delAuthYn , IFNULL(MAX(a.excl_up_auth_yn), 'N') AS exclUpAuthYn , IFNULL(MAX(a.excl_down_auth_yn), 'N') AS exclDownAuthYn , IFNULL(MAX(a.upld_auth_yn), 'N') AS upldAuthYn , IFNULL(MAX(a.down_auth_yn), 'N') AS downAuthYn FROM zzz_role_auth a INNER JOIN zzz_role_user_auth b ON a.sys_id = b.sys_id AND a.role_cd = b.role_cd WHERE a.sys_id = #{sysId} AND a.menu_cd = #{menuCd} AND b.emp_id = #{empId} AND b.use_yn = 'Y'
